  [0m[97m[41marp.node". Only allowed imports are to Node.js builtin modules or engines inte[0m
  [0m[97m[41mrnals.[0m

[0m  [0m[97m[41m- Ensure optional dependencies can be installed:[0m
[0m  [0m[97m[41m    npm install --include=optional sharp[0m
[0m  [0m[97m[41m- Ensure your package manager supports multi-platform installation:[0m
